data.content: Plan review requested revisions. The plan must include the queued write path in src/write_queue.rs and src/write_dispatch.rs; otherwise adding --acceptance to clap will not propagate into executed new/update operations. It must also thread acceptance through CreateKnotOptions/create_knot_with_options, not only App::create_knot, because kno new currently uses create_knot_with_options. Confirm whether first-class acceptance should also appear in human-readable kno show output in src/ui.rs in addition to JSON/prompt rendering.
